SEARCH
Package org.inasayaflanderin.abyssine.miscellaneous

Class Sort

java.lang.Object
org.inasayaflanderin.abyssine.miscellaneous.Sort
public class Sort extends Object

This class hold of sorting algorithms that Abyssine supported, it doesn't contain non-comparable sorting algorithms such as Radix sort

The input as follows:

array the array that needs to be sorted

list the list that needs to be sorted

comparator the order of the elements

start the start index (inclusive) of the array

end the end index (exclusive) of the array

<D> the type of the elements in the array

      public static <D> void quickParallel(D[] array, Comparator<D> comparator, int start, int end) throws InterruptedException
      Throws:
      InterruptedException - upon interruption because of the use of ForkJoinPool
